prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约101→78→85→83→101名，整体呈波动走势，2022年明显前移至78名后逐步后移，2025年回到101名基准位。近两年波动幅度约±20名；2021–2024年本省物理类计划均为30人，2025年增至34人（扩招约13%）；2026年计划大幅增至47人，较2025年扩招约38%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局有重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名连续6年稳居第2名，属全国顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园安全、录取断档信号及食堂宿舍等舆情；抖音热度总排名第3（高热），综合曝光量极高；2025年湖北本科提前批首次出现招生空档，可能对报考心理产生一定影响；拥有39个A-及以上学科，其中计算机科学与技术、数学、物理学、化学、生物学、法学、经济学等均为A+，学科实力全国顶尖，与物理类招生专业高度匹配。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北大物理类相关专业社会热度持续高热推荐；本省2026年物理类考生约25.14万人，较2025年（24.98万）小幅增加，2025年物理类本科批426分，近年波动平稳；北京大学位于北京市，非湖北省属高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在本省物理类招生占比极小，跨省报考竞争主要取决于全国性热度。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动（2025年基准101名）、2026年物理类大幅扩招约38%（计划从34人增至47人）对位次的后移作用，以及北大作为全国Top2高校的持续高热度和抖音高曝光，预计2026年物理类最低录取位次将后移至约124名；预测位次124名，区间109–139名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术）
- 数学类（数学与应用数学多个方向）
- 电子信息类（电子信息科学与技术、微电子科学与技术）
- 理科试验班类（元培）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 物理学类（物理学、大气科学）
- 化学类（化学、应用化学等）
- 生物科学类（生物科学、生物技术）
- 工科试验班类（理论与应用力学、工程力学等）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 地球物理学类（地球物理学、地理信息科学、空间科学与技术）
- 地质学类（地质学、地球化学）
- 环境科学（环境、健康、生态、地理与资源环境）
- 文物保护技术（古建）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（109–139名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。若位次明显优于区间下限（如109名以内），可重点冲击一档王牌专业（计算机类、数学类、电子信息类）；若位次接近区间上限（139名左右），应以三档专业保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category fluctuated approximately 101 → 78 → 85 → 83 → 101, showing an overall volatile trend, with a notable forward shift to 78 in 2022 followed by a gradual backward shift, returning to the baseline of 101 in 2025. The fluctuation range in recent two years is about ±20 places; from 2021 to 2024, the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 30 students each year, increasing to 34 in 2025 (an expansion of about 13%); the 2026 plan significantly increases to 47 students, an expansion of about 38% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion magnitude that significantly impacts the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 2nd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for 6 consecutive years, belonging to the top-tier national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety, admission cutoff signals, and cafeteria/dormitory public opinion; Douyin heat ranks 3rd overall (high heat), with extremely high comprehensive exposure; in 2025, Hubei undergraduate early admission batch saw enrollment vacancies for the first time, which may have a certain impact on application psychology; has 39 A- or above disciplines, among which Computer Science and Technology, Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Law, Economics, etc. are all A+, with top-tier national disciplinary strength, highly matching the Physics Category enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other related majors of Peking University Physics Category are consistently highly recommended in social heat; in 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in the province is about 251,400, a slight increase from 2025 (249,800); the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff is 426 points, with stable fluctuations in recent years; Peking University is located in Beijing, not a Hubei provincial university, with no local enrollment preference; the university's enrollment proportion in the province's Physics Category is extremely small, and cross-province application competition mainly depends on national popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations (baseline 101 in 2025), the significant expansion of about 38% in Physics Category in 2026 (plan increasing from 34 to 47 students) which will push the ranking backward, and Peking University's sustained high popularity as a national Top 2 university and high Douyin exposure, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will shift backward to about 124; predicted ranking 124, range 109–139.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science (Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics multiple directions)
- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Science and Technology, Microelectronics Science and Technology)
- Science Experimental Class (Yuanpei).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Physics (Physics, Atmospheric Science)
- Chemistry (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, etc.)
- Biological Sciences (Biological Science, Biotechnology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Theoretical and Applied Mechanics, Engineering Mechanics, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier)
- Geophysics (Geophysics, Geographic Information Science, Space Science and Technology)
- Geology (Geology, Geochemistry)
- Environmental Science (Environment, Health, Ecology, Geography and Resource Environment)
- Cultural Heritage Conservation (Ancient Architecture).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (109–139), it is recommended to mainly fill Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 109), you can focus on aiming for top Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Mathematics, Electronic Information); if your ranking is close to the upper bound of the range (around 139), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 28 → 35 → 32 → 30 → 30, overall stable around 30th, with a brief shift to 35th in 2022 before quickly recovering, and stable in the 30–32 range in recent three years; from 2021 to 2025, the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 22 students each year, and in 2026 the plan increases to 27 students, an expansion of about 23% compared to 2025, which is relatively large and has a downward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 2nd in the Soft Science China University Rankings for six consecutive years, belonging to the top tier of national universities; in 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety, admission cutoff signal gaps, and cafeteria/dormitory public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 3rd overall (high heat), with extremely high comprehensive exposure; in 2025, Hubei undergraduate early admission batch saw enrollment vacancies for the first time, which may have some impact on application psychology; has 39 A- or above disciplines, among which law, Chinese language and literature, philosophy, sociology, economics, business administration, journalism and communication, and other History Category-related disciplines are A+ or A, with discipline strength at the national top level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law, economics/finance, and other Peking University History Category-related majors are socially hot and recommended; in 2026, the province's History Category examinees are about 142,300, a slight increase from 2025 (141,400); in 2025, the History Category undergraduate batch cutoff was 442 points, with stable fluctuations in recent years; Peking University is located in Beijing, not a Hubei provincial university, so there is no local enrollment preference; its enrollment share in the province's History Category is extremely small, and cross-province application competition mainly depends on national popularity.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking stability around 30th, the downward effect on rankings from the approximately 23% expansion in History Category enrollment in 2026 (plan from 22 to 27 students), and Peking University's sustained high popularity as a national Top 2 university and high Douyin exposure, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for History Category in 2026 will shift downward to about 34th; predicted ranking 34th, range 29–39.

- Law
- Economics (Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade, Insurance, Public Finance)
- Business Administration (Finance, Finance (Financial Economics), Accounting, Marketing)
- Liberal Arts Experimental Class (Yuanpei).

Tier 2 (Medium)

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (29–39), it is recommended to mainly fill Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 29), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 flagship majors (Law, Economics, Business Administration); if your ranking is near the upper bound of the range (around 39), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety.
